mapper.select: select session_id, session_memory, compact_summary, session_memory_base_message_id, session_memory_range_end_message_id, compact_summary_base_message_id, compact_summary_range_end_message_id, context_version, updated_at from assistant_session_contexts where session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.insert: insert into assistant_session_contexts ( session_id, session_memory, compact_summary, session_memory_base_message_id, session_memory_range_end_message_id, compact_summary_base_message_id, compact_summary_range_end_message_id, context_version, updated_at ) values ( #{sessionId}, #{sessionMemory}, #{compactSummary}, #{sessionMemoryBaseMessageId}, #{sessionMemoryRangeEndMessageId}, #{compactSummaryBaseMessageId}, #{compactSummaryRangeEndMessageId}, coalesce(#{contextVersion}, 0), #{updatedAt} ) on conflict (session_id) do update set session_memory = excluded.session_memory, compact_summary = coalesce(excluded.compact_summary, assistant_session_contexts.compact_summary), session_memory_base_message_id = coalesce( excluded.session_memory_base_message_id, assistant_session_contexts.session_memory_base_message_id ), session_memory_range_end_message_id = coalesce( excluded.session_memory_range_end_message_id, assistant_session_contexts.session_memory_range_end_message_id ), compact_summary_base_message_id = coalesce( excluded.compact_summary_base_message_id, assistant_session_contexts.compact_summary_base_message_id ), compact_summary_range_end_message_id = coalesce( excluded.compact_summary_range_end_message_id, assistant_session_contexts.compact_summary_range_end_message_id ), context_version = coalesce(excluded.context_version, assistant_session_contexts.context_version), updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.update: update assistant_session_contexts set session_memory = #{context.sessionMemory}, compact_summary = #{context.compactSummary}, session_memory_base_message_id = #{context.sessionMemoryBaseMessageId}, session_memory_range_end_message_id = #{context.sessionMemoryRangeEndMessageId}, compact_summary_base_message_id = #{context.compactSummaryBaseMessageId}, compact_summary_range_end_message_id = #{context.compactSummaryRangeEndMessageId}, context_version = #{context.contextVersion}, updated_at = #{context.updatedAt} where session_id = #{context.sessionId} and context_version = #{expectedVersion}
